business_ideas.idea: Blueprint: Data-driven biological age reversal through lifestyle optimization and measurement
Kernel: Neuroimaging helmet for measuring brain activity and detecting cognitive decline
Synthetic biology and genomics companies (Ginkgo Bioworks, etc.) for biological engineering

predictions.text: Goal alignment within self, between people, and with AI is the core human challenge
Biological engineering will become as important and widespread as software engineering
Brain measurement will become standard of care like dental check-ups
